title: Fix the Rate Limiter & Request Logger
description: The API has a rate limiter (max 3 requests per window) and a request logger middleware — both are broken.
Bug 1: The rate limiter never resets — once you hit the limit, you're blocked forever even after the window expires.
Bug 2: The rate limiter blocks at 4 requests instead of 3 because the count check is off-by-one.
Bug 3: The logger middleware calls next() twice on non-error requests, causing Express to throw 'headers already sent'.
Fix all three so the tests pass.
